summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ThreatBase backend refactoring. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend login and dashboard render correctly. The server.py was successfully refactored from 6931 lines to 39 lines with 16 route modules.
critical_code_review_comments: Code refactoring successful - server.py reduced from 6931 to 39 lines
All 16 route modules properly registered in routes/__init__.py
API prefix /api correctly applied in server.py via api_router
Auth works across all route files via shared auth.py module
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring from monolithic server.py to modular routes completed and verified. All 16 route modules work correctly: auth, chat, threats, stats, failure_modes_routes, equipment, efms, tasks, forms, observations, decision_engine_routes, investigations, actions, ai_routes, maintenance, analytics. Test file test_refactored_routes.py covers all major endpoints.

backend_apis.POST /api/auth/login: PASSED - Login with test@test.com / test works

frontend_ui.Login flow: PASSED - Login with test@test.com / test works
frontend_ui.Navigation: PASSED - Dashboard, Observations, Causal Engine visible
frontend_ui.Equipment Hierarchy sidebar: PASSED - Shows 68 items in tree view
